notes: Chunk 31 complete 2026-06-06. Template B (Visual Journey), Tier A. 25 routes: US outbound to EU (Austria, Belgium, Denmark, Finland, Greece, Hungary, Norway, Poland, Romania, Sweden), US outbound to non-EU (Argentina, Egypt, Kenya, Nigeria, Vietnam), UK outbound to EU (Austria, Finland, Greece, Hungary, Poland, Romania), UK outbound to non-EU (Argentina, Egypt, Kenya), plus Vietnam-to-USA. Key regulatory detail: Echinococcus tapeworm for US-FI, US-NO, UK-FI (24-120h dogs only, Ruokavirasto/Mattilsynet); SENASA+FCDO apostille for UK-AR; CDC high-risk for VN-US (titre test or 28-day quarantine); Kenya cargo-only entry; MARD import permit for US-VN. Routes 5322 -> 5347, pages 6109 -> 6134. Tier A remaining: 140 -> 115. Next chunk 32 (Template C, Comparison Brief, Tier A). Blog Day 7 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
